case_title: ROLAND A MOSS III VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A et al

docket_entries.description: WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSS III, ROLAND A AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A WILLIAMS, GINA INDIVIDUAL HITCHENS, LAURA INDIVIDUAL ESPOSITO, ANDREW INDIVUAL SHAFI, NADIR INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-11-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-24-2011
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-18-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ROLAND A MOSS III, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-18-2011 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-02-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-18-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-11-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-18-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-18-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-18-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (610)
